title: Enums
description: Cross-cutting enumerations shared by entity / API / event schemas.

version_status.title: VersionStatus
version_status.description: Lifecycle states of a CodeSetVersion. See SPEC §2.2 etap 3 for the transition diagram.

hierarchy_mode.title: HierarchyMode
hierarchy_mode.description: NONE: flat. INTRA_CODESET: parent_key inside same CodeSet. CROSS_CODESET: parent_ref points to another CodeSet.

asset_role.title: AssetRole
asset_role.description: Roles attached to a specific asset (CodeSet or Domain). Distinct from base functional roles which come from Keycloak/AD groups.
